description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, gabled roof covered in reddish-brown tiles with visible weathering and moss growth. The exterior walls are finished in white plaster with exposed wooden beams in a half-timbered style, giving it a rustic, medieval European appearance. There are several small, rectangular windows with diamond-patterned panes and wooden frames, some of which are slightly recessed. The front facade includes a small arched wooden door, flanked by two windows, and the upper story slightly overhangs the lower level. A single, prominent chimney rises from the roof, and the structure shows signs of age with patches of discoloration and moss. The overall design suggests a traditional, historic residential building suited for a village or old town setting.
description: A weathered, half-timbered house with a steep gabled roof, reddish-brown tiles, and diamond-paned windows. The structure features a small arched door, visible chimney, and rustic, medieval European styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with an arched wooden door, two lower windows, and two upper windows set into the overhanging upper story.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gabled roof, chimney, and the exposed wooden framework with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with no door, several windows, and extensive moss and weathering on the plaster and beams.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the gabled roof, chimney, and the simple, windowless wall section.
attribute_entryway_design: Small arched wooden door with no porch or steps, framed by exposed beams and flanked by windows.
